# TokenPak vX.Y.Z

> **Zero-token operations. Maximum context efficiency.**

## 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
pip install tokenpak==X.Y.Z
tokenpak serve --port 8766
```

Point your LLM client's `base_url` at `http://localhost:8766` — no other config needed.

## 📦 Installation & Upgrade

```bash
# Fresh install
pip install tokenpak==X.Y.Z

# Upgrade from previous version
pip install --upgrade tokenpak==X.Y.Z
```
